paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **20B** open-source autoregressive language model trained on the diverse **Pile** corpus, featuring **rotary positional embeddings** applied selectively to the first 25% of embedding dimensions, parallel computation of attention and feed-forward layers, and a novel **untied layer norm** implementation. Demonstrates strong few-shot reasoning capabilities.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Pile (CommonCrawl, OpenWebText2, StackExchange, BookCorpus, Bibliotek, Project Gutenberg, YouTube subtitles, Ubuntu IRC, OpenSubtitles, HackerNews, EuroParl, GitHub, DeepMind Mathematics dataset, Enron Emails)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, mathematical reasoning, knowledge-based tasks, and few-shot learning.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling autoregressive language models to unprecedented sizes while maintaining open accessibility and evaluating few-shot reasoning capabilities.
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Twelve Supermicro AS-4124GO-NART servers, each with eight NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40GB GPUs and two AMD EPYC 7532 CPUs, connected via InfiniBand network with NVIDIA MQM8700 switches.
raw_extraction.extension: Rotary positional embeddings applied only to the first 25% of embedding vectors, combined with parallel attention and feed-forward layers for improved efficiency.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Scalable autoregressive transformer architecture optimized for efficient training and inference, leveraging a sparse attention mechanism called FlashAttention.
raw_extraction.application: Autoregressive language modeling, text generation, natural language processing tasks, and open-source alternatives to proprietary models.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability and efficiency of large language models while maintaining performance on downstream tasks.
raw_extraction.extension: FlashAttention enables efficient computation of attention scores, reducing memory usage during training.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model
